task: accelerating GNN computation on single and multiple GPUs
input: graph-structured data (e.g., user-item interaction graphs, molecular graphs, social networks)
output: computed GNN outputs (e.g., node embeddings or predictions)
backbone: two-level parallelism paradigm (vertex parallelism + feature parallelism) with hybrid dynamic workload assignment and kernel fusion
key_idea: divide GNN computation into vertex-level and feature-level parallelism with hybrid dynamic workload assignment and kernel fusion to reduce overhead
